Video.summary: Racing, donuts, freestyle and special guests as Monster Jam visits AT&T Stadium.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from Angel Stadium on February 22, 2020.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue from Indianapolis as Son-Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson looks to extend his racing winning streak as Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga tries to win back-to-back Overall Event Championships. Meanwhile Cynthia Gauthier attempts to guide the Lucas Stabilizer to her third freestyle win of the season.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: All the superstars of Monster Jam gather together at the Silverdome to establish one more victory before heading to the world finals.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: The competition heats up with the freestyle action from the HHH Metrodome, on February 19, 2005.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Get ready to jam with Monster Jam's racing action from Cowboys Stadium, on February 25, 2012.
Video.title: Cowboys Stadium - Arlington, TX - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season continues with round 19 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Lumen Field, in Seattle, Wa.
Video.title: Lumen Field - Seattle, WA

Video.summary: The drivers go head to head on the Nashville course.
Video.title: Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into Jacksonville, FL with fun for the whole family on February 23, 2008.
Video.title: Jacksonville Municipal Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Buckle up for Monster Jam racing action from Ford Field, on January 8, 2011.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Watch as Monster Jam rocks into the UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium on March 7, 2009.
Video.title: Sun Bowl - El Paso, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out all the racing and freestyle action from Monster Jam's 2021 season at NRG Stadium on January 30, 2021!
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson looks to extend his series points lead as Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy attempts to climb back to the top of the Stadium Championship Series Red leaderboard. Megalodon’s Todd Leduc is riding a wave of momentum as he continues his rise back into title contention.
Video.title: JMA Wireless Dome - Syracuse, NY

Video.summary: Monster Jam revs into the Orlando Citrus Bowl on January 26, 2013 with racing and freestyle action!
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Check out the exciting Monster Jam racing action from Lincoln Financial Field, on June 9, 2012.
Video.title: Lincoln Financial Field - Philadelphia, PA - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 4 of the Stadium Championship Series, at Petco Park, in San Diego, CA.
Video.title: Petco Park - San Diego, CA

Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Racing

Video.summary: At the Sprint Center on January 18, 2020, Monster Jam's 2020 season heats up with triple threat action!
Video.title: Sprint Center - Kansas City, MO

Video.summary: Don't miss this epic compilation of the best freestyle run moments from 2019.
Video.title: Best of Freestyle Runs - 2019

Video.summary: Watch exciting Monster Jam freestyle action with backflips, forward momentum poppers, and more!
Video.title: Top Freestyles And Racing Wins Compilation

Video.summary: Sparkle Smash is back and better than ever in this all-new compilation! Check out the wildest stunts, biggest air, and most colorful moments from the Sparkle Smash Bash, featuring highlights from the epic second half of the 2025 season.
Video.title: Sparkle Smash Stunts 2025 Compilation

Video.summary: Don't miss this action-packed compilation full of your favorite Avenger, Megalodon, Monster Mutt, and driver Adam Anderson moments!
Video.title: Best of Avenger, Megalodon, Monster Mutt, and Adam Anderson

Video.summary: The fun continues during Monster Jam's 2014 season stop at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, TX.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL, featuring championship race and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Hold on tight while witnessing the fun at Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA during Monster Jam's 2013 season!
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA

Video.summary: Arena in 30 visits Columbus, OH for Round 15 of Arena in 30 - stay tuned for freestyle and racing fun with your favorite trucks and drivers!
Video.title: Value City Arena - Columbus, OH

Video.summary: It's the 2019 World Finals racing competition!
Video.title: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Racing
World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Racing
World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam storms into the Fiserv Forum in Milwaukee for an adrenaline-fueled stop on the Freestyle Media Championship Series. The night features a high-stakes lineup of JCB Racing, the technical Two Wheel Skills Challenge, and the fan-favorite Freestyle competition where drivers have 75 seconds to push their machines to the limit. Rivalries ignite as four-time champion Weston Anderson and 2025 Entertainer of the Year Fernando Martinez battle for dominance, while local heroes like Brandon and Mikayla Tulachka look to claim victory in front of their hometown crowd. From precision nose wheelies to gravity-defying backflips, this episode captures every heart-pounding moment as eight elite teams compete for the overall event title.
Video.title: Fiserv Forum, Milwaukee, WI

Video.summary: It’s the dramatic finale of the Fall Stadium Series from State Farm Stadium in Glendale, Arizona! In this special "Sparkle Smash Bash" event celebrating Kayla Blood and her truck.Tyler Menninga (Grave Digger) dominates the racing bracket, while Tristan England (JCB Digatron) shows incredible control in the Skills Challenge. The drama peaks in Freestyle as Camden Murphy (Classroom Crusher) attempts a comeback, but Armando Castro (El Toro Loco) fights to secure his first-ever Stadium Series Championship.
Video.title: State Farm Stadium - Glendale, AZ
